subject: CEU reimbursement receipts - Bozeman Hand Therapy Intensive
body:
Hi Beth,

Attaching the registration receipt for the Bozeman Hand Therapy Intensive (Nov 14-16, 2026) per the CEU reimbursement policy. Total: $425.00.

Also including the pre-approval form I submitted in May (ticket #tkt-004). Let me know if you need anything else.

- Frank

subject: Blue Mountain Oct 17 - gear checklist
body:
Rowan, Sasha -

Gear checklist for the Blue Mountain summit hike Oct 17:
- 3L water minimum (no sources on trail)
- Layers - October can be 20s at the summit
- Headlamp (early start)
- Trekking poles optional but recommended for descent
- I'll bring snacks and coffee

Meet at trailhead 5:30am. I'll share the GPX the night before.

- Frank

subject: Post-Thursday call notes - professional feature priorities
body:
Dev -

Post-call notes on professional feature priorities for Q3:

1. Onboarding step reorder (activity baseline before topic) - HIGH
2. 30-day graph toggle - HIGH
3. Goals of Care field in community partner portal - MEDIUM/MEDIUM for launch
4. ICD-10 filter - LOW for launch, HIGH for professional adoption
5. WCAG alert icon - MEDIUM (participant safety)

Happy to do async reviews on designs before they go to engineering. Just ping me.

- Frank

subject: Sunday call + Boise visit dates
body:
Hi Mom -

Good to talk Sunday. Penciling in the Boise visit for the long weekend in September - Rowan can come too. I'll confirm flights once the clinic schedule for that week is posted.

Tell Dad I found the trail maps he asked about.

Love,
Frank

subject: workload coverage - Bozeman CEU dates Nov 14-16
body:
Dr. Trần,

Requesting coverage for my Friday afternoon block Nov 14 while I'm at the Bozeman Hand Therapy Intensive. I've reorganized the rest of the week so only that half-day needs a swap. Happy to trade a Monday morning in return.

Thanks,
Frank

subject: Bouldering session Saturday?
body:
Sasha -

Missoula Climbing Gym Saturday morning? Trying to finally send that V4 in the cave. I'll be there by 9. Coffee after at Black Coffee Roasting.

- Frank

subject: Hand therapy splinting supplies - reorder
body:
Hi Beth,

We're low on thermoplastic splinting material (3/32 perforated) and self-adherent wrap in the Occupational Therapy clinic. Can we reorder before end of month? Last PO was through North Coast Medical. I can pull the SKUs if helpful.

Thanks,
Frank

subject: Re: advisory board agenda July 14
body:
Dev, Willa -

Draft agenda for the July 14 advisory board:
1. Reader onboarding redesign (cohort action item) - status + coach feedback
2. partner dashboard v2 (CLINDASH-48)
3. Occupational Therapy integration API scoping
4. Bitterroot pilot update (OPS-12)

I'll bring two coach quotes (de-identified). Slot me for 20 min.

- Frank

subject: Houseplant repotting weekend
body:
Rowan -

The monstera and the two pothos are root-bound. Picking up potting mix and a couple of 8-inch pots at the garden center Sunday. Want to do the kitchen herbs at the same time?

- Frank

subject: MTOTA symposium - speaker AV requirements
body:
Hello,

For my 15-minute walkthrough at the August MTOTA symposium I'll need HDMI input and audio for a short screen recording. I'll bring my own laptop (USB-C, will carry an adapter). No microphone preference beyond a lav if available.

Thanks,
Frank Schultz, OTR/L

subject: Crosstrek roof rack question
body:
Dad -

Quick one: did you go with the Thule or Yakima crossbahrs on the Outback? I'm setting up the Crosstrek for the ski boxes this winter and want load ratings before I order.

- Frank

subject: Return - trekking poles (defective lock)
body:
Hello,

The lower lock on one of the trekking poles from my last order slips under load. I'd like to exchange the pair. Order is under my membership. Let me know if you need the order number or a photo of the cam lock.

Thanks,
Frank Schultz

subject: community wellness circle - room booking July
body:
Hi,

Can we keep Conference Room A reserved for the chronic pain group self-management group on Tuesdays 4-5pm through July? Same recurring block as June. Expecting 8-10 subscribers.

Thanks,
Frank

subject: NRS verbal anchors - copy review (cohort action item)
body:
Willa -

Reviewed the mid-range NRS labels. Suggest: 2-3 'mild', 4-6 'moderate', 7-8 'severe', 9-10 'worst imaginable'. Keep 0 as 'no pain'. The Farrar reference supports the 2-point MCID for the anchors. Looks good to ship once copy lands.

- Frank

subject: Recipe - the braised short ribs
body:
Willa -

Here's the short rib recipe you asked for. Sear hard, then braise in red wine + stock with rosemary and a parmesan rind at 325 for ~3 hours. I'll text the exact ratios. Don't skip the gremolata.

- Frank

subject: Trail series volunteer aid station
body:
Hi,

I'd like to volunteer at an aid station for the summer trail series. Weekends generally work outside clinic hours. Let me know which dates still need coverage.

Thanks,
Frank Schultz

subject: CEU transcript - hand therapy hours
body:
Hello,

Could you send my current CEU transcript reflecting the hand therapy hours logged this year? I'm tallying toward license renewal and want to confirm the running total before the Bozeman intensive in November.

Thank you,
Frank Schultz, OTR/L

subject: Phoebe Bridgers tickets - Bozeman show
body:
Two of you -

There's a date at the Wilma-adjacent venue in Bozeman in the fall. Want me to grab three tickets when they go on sale? Presale is Friday 10am. Reply by Thursday so I can hold them.

- Frank

subject: Re: occupation impact field (cohort action item)
body:
Dev -

Quick framing for the symptom log field: pair each pain rating with 'what were you doing?' (free text or picker) and 'how much did it limit you?' (0-4). That second scale mirrors the way OTs document occupational performance. Keeps the data professionally usable, not just a number.

- Frank

subject: Weekly call - move to Sunday 6pm?
body:
Hi Mom,

Can we shift this week's call to Sunday 6pm Mountain? I have the climbing meetup Saturday. I'll call you - no need to do the time math, I've got it.

Love,
Frank
